exercises.name: Incline DB Bench Press
exercises.detail: 60 lb × 10 · 3 sets — push 12 on last set
exercises.note: Controlled eccentric (2 sec down). Slight incline. If last set hits 12 clean, go to 62.5s next session.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.note: Seated or standing. Full press overhead, slight forward lean. You have been at 35s — these should feel solid today.

exercises.name: T-Bar Row
exercises.note: Up from 45 lb. Chest on pad, elbows drive back, full retraction at top. One pull movement to keep the session balanced.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.note: Lead with elbows, stop at shoulder height. Do not shrug. Hits the medial delt — exactly what you want after doing mostly front delt at HIIT.

exercises.name: Rope Pushdown + Face Pull (superset)
exercises.detail: Rope Pushdown: 77 lb × 12 · 3 rounds / Face Pull: 40 lb × 15 · 3 rounds
exercises.note: Superset back-to-back. Pushdown: elbows pinned, flare rope out at bottom. Face Pull: elbows high and wide, pull to forehead level. Rear delts and rotator cuff — do not skip it.

exercises.name: Core Circuit — Bird Dog + Pallof Press + Side Plank
exercises.detail: Bird Dog: 8/side · 2 rounds / Pallof Press: 20 lb × 10/side · 2 rounds / Side Plank: 25 sec/side · 2 rounds
exercises.note: Lower abs are still sore from Saturday — skipping anything that loads them. Anti-rotation focused. Bird Dog: pause 1 sec at full extension. Pallof: brace hard before you press.

week.note: Active recovery — walk or pickleball if you feel good
Hips and hamstrings should be recovered by now
